claim: The framework shall not include illustrative example graph content in its source modules, keeping worked examples in domain graph.json files that are the user's own content.
why: Atom of R-content-free-framework (no-examples concern). D1 split decided by domain-user 2026-06-30. WHY: example data in source drifts from the user's real content and misleads adopters into thinking it is real content. This holds by construction: all business content lives in domains/<name>/graph.json loaded by internal/loader at runtime, never compiled into the framework source. ENFORCED 2026-07-13: TestContentFree_NoExamples in internal/selfcheck/contentfree_test.go mechanically verifies this claim by static source scan: no populated graph-node composite literal (Requirement/Conflict/Axis/Stakeholder/...) may appear outside the two content-intake boundaries internal/proposal and cmd/hotam/init_cmd.go.
